frothy init — scaffold a new Frothy project in the current directory

Init scaffolds a new Frothy project in the current directory: a frothy.toml with the project name and target, a main.fr with a starter definition, and a .gitignore that excludes the local cache. It refuses to overwrite existing files, so it is safe to run by accident.

Examples:
  frothy init
      create frothy.toml, main.fr, and .gitignore in the current directory

Flags:
